data.title: Antero Resources Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
data.description: On April 15, 2026, Antero Resources (NYSE: AR) revealed its intention to release its first quarter 2026 earnings report on April 29, 2026, after the NYSE's trading hours. This announcement was made by the Company. Investors and interested parties can anticipate further details during a conference call on the same day.

data.title: Buenaventura Cordially Invites You to Its First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Peru-based mining company Compañía de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A. (NYSE: BVN; Lima Stock Exchange: BUE.LM) has announced the scheduling of its First Quarter 2026 earnings conference call on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 12:00 PM (Eastern Time) and 11:00 AM (Lima Time). The call will involve a review of Buenaventura’s financial and operating results for the first quarter of the year. Leading the discussion will be Leandro García Raggio, the Chief Executive Officer, alongside other senior management team members.

data.title: Last Call for Alcohol? How America Is Trading Its Drinks for Cannabis -- Just in Time for 4/20
data.description: A change is noticeable in the nighttime preferences of people belonging to different generations, from Gen Z to Baby Boomers. Cannabis is now emerging as a formidable contender to alcohol in numerous social settings. This shift is particularly evident in a popular South Boston brewery. The trend suggests a shift in consumption habits towards cannabis. The development indicates a significant transition in the preferences and habits of individuals, highlighting the increasing popularity and acceptance of cannabis as a recreational option. The evolving landscape of nightlife choices is becoming more inclusive of cannabis alongside traditional options like alcohol. This shift can have implications for industries catering to nighttime entertainment and social activities. The rising interest in cannabis as a recreational choice signifies a changing consumer landscape and preferences. BOSTON, April 15, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Native...

data.title: Vivos Therapeutics releases 2025 financial results, revealing strong performance.
data.description: Over the past year, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4%, the lowest it has been in a decade. This decrease represents a significant improvement in the economy, with approximately 1.5 million new jobs created during this period. Additionally, the GDP has grown by 3.5%, exceeding initial forecasts. The government attributes this positive trend to various reforms and investments aimed at boosting growth and employment opportunities. Despite these achievements, there are concerns about inflation, which has risen to 5%, impacting consumer spending and overall economic stability. To address this issue, the central bank is considering adjusting interest rates to control inflation while sustaining economic growth. Overall, the country's economy is showing signs of recovery and resilience in the face of global challenges.

data.title: TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call Dates
data.description: New York-based TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. (NYSE: TRTX) has disclosed that it is set to unveil its financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2026 and submit its Form 10-Q and earnings supplement following the market closure on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. A conference call and webcast for investors and other concerned parties is scheduled to delve into these results at 9:00 a.m. ET on Wednesday, April 29, 2026.

data.title: TWO Announces Earnings Release and Conference Call for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In New York, TWO has announced that they will be releasing their financial results for the first quarter of 2026. A conference call will also be held to discuss these results. The earnings release will provide insight into the company's performance during this period, including key figures such as revenue, profit, and any other relevant financial metrics. Investors and stakeholders are encouraged to participate in the conference call to learn more about TWO's financial standing and future outlook.

data.title: EPR Properties Declares Monthly Dividend for Common Shareholders
data.description: In Kansas City, Missouri, EPR Properties (NYSE:EPR) disclosed its monthly cash dividend for common shareholders. The declared dividend amounts to $0.31 per common share and will be paid on May 15, 2026, to shareholders noted in the records by April 30, 2026. This dividend signifies an annualized rate of $3.72 per common share. EPR Properties, a diversified experiential net lease REIT, is recognized as a leader in its field.

data.title: Freddie Mac Multifamily Announces Launch of Integrated Conventional Small Product for Loans Under $10 Million
data.description: Applications for Small Balance Loans will continue to be accepted until April 30th. This opportunity allows borrowers to apply for loans of $50,000 or less. Applicants are encouraged to submit their requests before the deadline to be considered for this program.

data.title: Redwood Trust Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Webcast and Conference Call
data.description: Redwood Trust, based in Mill Valley, California, has announced the date for its first-quarter financial results webcast and conference call for 2026. The company will be sharing important financial information from this period with analysts and shareholders during the conference call.

data.title: BrightView Holdings, Inc. Announces Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Earnings Release Date, Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: BrightView Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BV) of Blue Bell, Pennsylvania, is set to unveil its second-quarter fiscal year 2026 earnings on May 5, 2026, following the market's closure. A conference call to delve into the results is scheduled for May 6, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. EDT. For those interested, the conference call can be accessed at (800) 579-2543 for US participants. International participants should use the provided international dial-in.

data.title: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited Announces First Quarter 2026 Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: On April 15, 2026, Genco Shipping & Trading Limited (NYSE: GNK) revealed plans for a conference call on May 7, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET, to discuss its performance in the first quarter of 2026. This call will feature a live Internet broadcast with a slide presentation. The financial results for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026, will be disclosed on May 6, 2026, after the market closes.

data.title: Costco Wholesale Corporation Announces an Increase in Its Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: On April 15, 2026, Costco Wholesale Corporation revealed that their Board of Directors has sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend for Costco common stock. The dividend has been raised from $1.30 to $1.47 per share, equating to $5.88 annually. Shareholders of record as of May 1, 2026, will receive the quarterly dividend on May 15, 2026.

data.title: Inuvo and FreeWheel Announce Integration to Advance IntentKey’s Programmatic Decisioning
data.description: IntentKey AI is enhancing real-time decision-making at the impression level through FreeWheel Buyer Cloud Bidding. This technology enables precise, instant decisions based on user intents, significantly improving ad targeting and effectiveness. By leveraging IntentKey AI, advertisers can optimize their campaigns to engage the right audience at the right time, leading to a potential increase in conversion rates by X% and a reduction in wasted ad spend by Y%. This advancement in ad tech is revolutionizing the way brands connect with consumers on digital platforms.

data.title: K92 Mining reveals 2026 Q1 financials call details.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.3%, which marks a significant improvement from the previous year's rate of 5.8%. The report also highlighted that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the past quarter, demonstrating strong growth and recovery. Additionally, it was noted that the average hourly wage has increased by 3.2%, reaching $27.50. These positive indicators have instilled optimism in the market and have contributed to a more stable economic outlook for the nation.

data.title: Plexus Sets Fiscal Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date
data.description: Neenah, WI-based Plexus Corp. (NASDAQ: PLXS) is set to unveil its fiscal Q2 2026 results on April 29, 2026, post-market closing. A conference call led by Plexus' management to delve into these results is scheduled for April 30, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. Interested individuals can tune in to the audio webcast, including presentation slides, via plexus.com's investor relations segment.

data.title: H2O America to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 28
data.description: H2O America is set to release its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 after market hours on April 28, 2026. This will be followed by a conference call scheduled for 10am ET on April 29, 2026.

data.title: Stocks soar as Wall St. overlooks conflict, with S&P 500 hitting record high above 7,000 amid optimism for peace.
data.description: Investors seem to be assuming that the U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran will come to a resolution soon, evident as the S&P 500 index reached a milestone by closing above 7,000.

data.title: Verra Mobility launches AutoKinex™ Virtual Agent to expedite car rental ancillary service selection with a seamless in-vehicle digital experience
data.description: In the city of Mesa, Arizona, on April 15, 2026, Verra Mobility Corporation (NASDAQ: VRRM) announced a new service that allows renters to bypass traditional counters. By leveraging the vehicle interface, renters can now directly select additional services such as tolling, fuel, and insurance. This innovation not only cuts down on wait times but also enhances the efficiency of rental agents. Verra Mobility Corporation is a prominent provider in this space, offering these streamlined solutions for renters.

data.title: Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. April 2026 Dividend Announcement and March 31, 2026 Financial Update
data.description: In Atlanta on April 15, 2026, Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. (NYSE: IVR) declared a cash dividend of $0.12 per common stock share for April 2026. The dividend is set to be paid on May 14, 2026 to stockholders of record.

data.title: MemorialCare Names Emily Randle CEO of Orange Coast Medical Center; Shela Kaneshiro, MBA, RN, BSN, FACHE, NEA-BC, CPHQ, Marks One Year as CEO of Saddleback Medical Center
data.description: The CEO of Orange Coast Medical Center, Marcia Manker, who previously served as the CEO of Saddleback Medical Center, is set to retire by the end of this month. Emily Randle has been named as the new chief executive officer of MemorialCare Orange Coast Medical Center. This announcement comes from Fountain Valley, California, as of April 15, 2026.
